Live feed

11.05 AM BST

The Guardian reports that enterprise AI programs are now judged on operational resilience as much as on model novelty.

Buyers increasingly ask how a deployment behaves when upstream providers change terms, when retrieval quality degrades, or when monitoring flags risky output.

Sign up for our daily newsletter

Teams that can show rollback paths, human approvals, and incident review discipline are moving faster through procurement than teams selling benchmarks alone.
